trigger.summary: User requested merging the standalone mlb-trends-dashboard.html widgets into the live daily dashboard as a second tab. integration/ remains the original 3-panel build; final/ adds the Trends tab and supporting modules.

added_files.rationale: New fetcher module: GET /teams/stats?group=hitting and /teams/stats?group=pitching plus a 14-day schedule call for the W/L heatmap. Mirrors data-client.js's DataClientError pattern with a sibling StatsClientError.

Renders the 7 trend widgets (KPI strip, sortable standings, last-10 leaderboard, RS-vs-RA scatter, OPS-vs-ERA scatter, home/road bars, power/discipline scatter, 14-day heatmap). Lifted verbatim from mlb-trends-dashboard.html and re-wired to consume live fetched data instead of an inlined MLB_DATA blob.

modified_files.diff_summary: Added tab nav (Daily / Trends), wrapped existing 3 panels in <section id="tab-daily">, added new <section id="tab-trends" hidden> with filter chips + 7 widget containers (kpis, standings-table, last10-board, rsra-chart, ops-era-chart, home-road-chart, power-disc-chart, heatmap-body). Chart.js script tag NOT included in HTML — lazy-loaded by app.js on first Trends activation.

Added imports from stats-client.js. Added dailyFetchCache so the Trends tab reuses the teams+standings already fetched by the Daily tab. Added TRENDS state object, loadChartJs(), ensureTrendsView(), activateTab(), wireTabs(). Bootstrap now calls wireTabs() before init(). Daily tab render path is unchanged.

Appended .tabs / .tab-button styling and a fully namespaced .trends-* style block (filterbar, chips, KPIs, cards, sortable standings, leaderboard, heatmap). Trends surface uses its own dark CSS variables so it has visual identity without clashing with the Daily light theme.

Added revision: rev-1. Listed new files (stats-client.js, trends-charts.js, divergence-from-integration.json). Updated module_graph. Added external_runtime_dependencies entry for Chart.js 4.4.0 (lazy-loaded). Added notes.trends_view_added describing the extension. Added completed_at.

rationale: User-requested feature extension: merged trends-dashboard widgets into the daily dashboard adding a Trends tab. final/ now diverges from integration/ by addition of new modules and modifications to index.html/app.js/styles.css. Original Daily tab experience is preserved byte-for-byte in behavior — only structural HTML changed (wrapped in a tab-panel section); the JS render path is untouched. Re-integration would require an Integrator pass on the new files, but per Maintenance precedent for incremental revisions to delivered builds, this divergence is recorded here without re-running integration.
